summary: Iteration 30 - Throughput Engine, Cafeteria Domain, Share Links Complete. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Scenario Planner (throughput analysis section, Clear Time/Dish Pit metrics, Staff Breakdown with Captains/Bussers/Stations), Client Portal (Share analytics section with 4 links/3 views visible in lead detail, Prospect wizard, Lead Management dashboard).
critical_code_review_comments: Knowledge Engine correctly returns 14 domains including timeline_throughput and cafeteria_dining
Scenario Planner build-scenario returns throughput_analysis with plates_to_clear, est_clear_minutes, dish_pit_racks, dish_pit_time_minutes, timeline_feasible
Scenario Planner staffing_estimate includes captains, bussers, station_staff fields
is_outdoor=true correctly triggers distance_penalty risk flag with distance_multiplier > 1.0
Scenario Planner compare endpoint returns clear_time_delta and dish_pit_delta in deltas
Client Portal submit-lead creates lead and returns lead_id
Client Portal share-link/{lead_id} creates share token and returns share_url
Client Portal shared/{share_token} returns estimate and increments views
Client Portal share-analytics/{lead_id} returns total_links and total_views
Frontend Scenario Planner shows throughput analysis section after comparison
Frontend Scenario Planner shows staff breakdown with Captains, Bussers, Stations fields
Frontend Client Portal Lead Management shows Share analytics section with link/view counts
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER30_ShareTest and TEST_ITER30_LeadTest leads with share links during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified new throughput engine integration, cafeteria domain, and share link features. Key endpoints: Knowledge Engine (GET /api/knowledge-engine/domains returns 14 domains including timeline_throughput and cafeteria_dining), Scenario Planner (POST /build-scenario returns throughput_analysis and enhanced staffing with captains/bussers/station_staff, POST /compare returns clear_time_delta and dish_pit_delta), Client Portal (POST /share-link/{lead_id}, GET /shared/{share_token}, GET /share-analytics/{lead_id}). Frontend panels show throughput analysis section, staff breakdown, and share analytics in lead detail.

scenario_planner_throughput.build_scenario_returns_throughput_analys: PASS - plates_to_clear, est_clear_minutes, dish_pit_racks, dish_pit_time_minutes, timeline_feasible

client_portal_share.view_shared_estimate: PASS - returns estimate and increments views

backend_tests.full_integration: PASS - all new fields present in full scenario

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use deterministic rule engines backed by LUCCCA knowledge bases

scenario_planner_throughput.outdoor_distance_penalty: is_outdoor=true triggers distance_penalty risk flag with distance_multiplier > 1.0

scenario_planner_staffing.calculation: captains = ceil(foh/8), bussers = ceil(foh/2.5), station_staff for buffet/stations service styles

client_portal_share.share_link_creation: POST /share-link/{lead_id} creates token in portal_share_links collection
client_portal_share.shared_view: GET /shared/{token} returns estimate and increments views

frontend.scenario_planner: Throughput Analysis section, Clear Time/Dish Pit metrics, Staff Breakdown with Captains/Bussers/Stations
frontend.client_portal: Share analytics section in lead detail showing links and views
